mechanism: PDE5 inhibition prevents cGMP degradation in vascular smooth muscle → vasodilation. Nitrates increase cGMP production via NO → guanylate cyclase. Combined effect = profound cGMP-mediated vasodilation → severe hypotension, potentially fatal. Absolute contraindication.

contextualModifiers.effect: absolute contraindication — risk of fatal hypotension

sourceSnippet: ACC/AHA Guidelines; FDA label; StatPearls PDE5 Inhibitors
